name: littlepowers
description: Phương pháp phát triển phần mềm cho coding agents: planning, TDD, debugging & collaboration workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Planning, TDD, debugging & delivery workflows cho coding agents
interface.longDescription: Sử dụng LittlePowers để dẫn dắt agent qua brainstorming, implementation planning, test-driven development, systematic debugging, parallel execution, code review, và finish-the-branch workflows.
defaultPrompt: Mình có ý tưởng muốn build.
